description: Zero-config React meta-framework CLI for building AI-native applications. Git-like workflow with pull/push/merge/deploy commands. Supports pulling from main, branches, environments, and releases.
rules: Use Zod schemas for CLI argument validation
Export parseArgs and schema from command modules for testability
Always provide --dry-run flag for destructive operations
Use central COMMANDS registry for help and usage strings
Fail fast with clear error messages - no silent fallbacks
Co-locate unit tests with implementation files
Use PullSource type for branch/env/release/main discrimination
Push without --branch creates auto-generated branch name
Push with --branch=main pushes directly to main (no branch)
